title: Smoky Italian Stew
description: A hearty, smoky stew filled with the flavors of Italy. Perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: Red Wine
ingredients.notes: Red wine adds depth to the stew

instructions: Brown the sausage in olive oil over medium-high heat, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
Remove the browned sausage from the pot and set it aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it's softened and translucent.
Add the Italian stew tomatoes, beef broth, dried basil, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine, then add the browned sausage back into the pot.
Bring the stew to a simmer and let it cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the sausage is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil if desired.
